ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB identifier for the film */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the film */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the film */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the film */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or synopsis of the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average user rating of the film */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year when the film was released */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the film */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase of the film */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the film */,
  "production_cost" TEXT /* Total production cost including marketing and distribution */,
  "marketing_cost" TEXT /* Marketing cost */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score based on user activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film associated with the cast member */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "character_age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "actor_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "actor_role" TEXT /* Role of the actor (e.g., Lead, Supporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film directed */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "director_awards" TEXT /* Notable awards won by the director */,
  "director_filmography" TEXT /* List of notable films directed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film associated with the genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Drama, Action) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film produced */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "company_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the production company */,
  "company_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_companies_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the film by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "review_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "review_helpfulness" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, User) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film associated with the tag */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_tags_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
